name: Seth Moulton
subject: The work ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26358695/276693085/-333616605?refcode=email_20210316_SA_SM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWJjMTUyMy0xZDg3LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lqqijDbtHyEiESZlUl8DrhO0YPCe99_idRMLCK714H8=) Friend, We’ve been through a lot together over the last year—the COVID-19 pandemic, the end of Trump’s presidency, and now, a new day for America. It’s been a bumpy ride and I feel lucky to have you on my team. While sheltering in the Capitol with the rest of Congress during the January 6th Capitol attack, I thought to myself, “Is this what we want America to be?” The simple answer: No. For the most part, we live in a beautifully complex but well-functioning democracy. Most of us want to see our neighbors succeed and help each other through this pandemic. Most of us revere the democratic process and the law. Most of us believe in science and trust vaccines. Most of us want the best for each other, even when we disagree. The American Rescue Plan—something made possible only by the work of fired-up Democrats like you—is one of our greatest legislative achievements. It represents the best of government and the best of America. But, friend, there is still work to do. Despite our shared belief in America and common goal of making it the best it can be, there is a disturbing trend in our politics right now. Right-wing extremism has taken shape in a way we haven’t seen before. Disinformation and conspiracy theories are more prevalent than ever. And a class of ultra-rich Republican mega-donors and dark money super PACs are clinging to power by fueling divisiveness in our political system. Our hard-won Democratic majorities offer hope today—but we can’t afford to get complacent. Republican political strategists are already looking at the map to see where they can flip seats and poke holes in our unified Congress. Donald Trump has floated launching his own Super PAC and even mounting another presidential bid. Trump and his Republican allies are going to do everything they can to reverse the progress we’ve all fought so hard to achieve. I look forward to working with all of you for the next two years to preserve and expand our critical majorities in the House and Senate. [**If you’re able, please make a contribution to Serve America today to ensure we have the resources we need to help our endorsed candidates get across the finish line.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26358696/276693086/-1414281322?refcode=email_20210316_SA_SM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWJjMTUyMy0xZDg3LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lqqijDbtHyEiESZlUl8DrhO0YPCe99_idRMLCK714H8=) Thanks for all you do. Onward, Seth [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26358697/276693087/-333616605?refcode=email_20210316_SA_SM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWJjMTUyMy0xZDg3LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lqqijDbtHyEiESZlUl8DrhO0YPCe99_idRMLCK714H8=)
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26358698/276693088/1848844371?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWJjMTUyMy0xZDg3LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lqqijDbtHyEiESZlUl8DrhO0YPCe99_idRMLCK714H8=&emci=690b0ede-1c87-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=c9bc1523-1d87-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&ceid=194769) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26358699/276693089/-1745464800?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWJjMTUyMy0xZDg3LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lqqijDbtHyEiESZlUl8DrhO0YPCe99_idRMLCK714H8=&emci=690b0ede-1c87-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=c9bc1523-1d87-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&ceid=194769) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26358700/276693090/341442065?hl=en&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWJjMTUyMy0xZDg3LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lqqijDbtHyEiESZlUl8DrhO0YPCe99_idRMLCK714H8=&emci=690b0ede-1c87-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=c9bc1523-1d87-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&ceid=194769) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26358701/276693091/-368236352?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWJjMTUyMy0xZDg3LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lqqijDbtHyEiESZlUl8DrhO0YPCe99_idRMLCK714H8=&emci=690b0ede-1c87-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=c9bc1523-1d87-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&ceid=194769)

# How to Launch a Business that Protects the Environment
---
---
The demand for sustainable products and services has exploded over the past few years, and eco-minded business owners are coming out on top. Launching a sustainable business is an excellent move—for yourself and the planet! The environment is a key issue on congressional candidate [Mia Mason’s platform](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/199429?id=407132.1518.1.1221a76b5db969d735b2da320e42a2d2&p=eyIlN0IlN0JtaW1pLXNpZ25hdHVyZSU3RCU3RCI6IjE2MjQ2Njc0OS0xMjg2MDE5MjU1My1kNTAxOTIzZTU0NjU5ZDgzYzM1NjY2MzFmMWJhNGMyNzc3MWI2ZDJiIiwiJTdCJTdCZW1haWxJZCU3RCU3RCI6IjQwNzEzMiJ9), and she understands that entrepreneurs who love the planet are the key to curbing climate change and protecting the environment for generations to come. If you’re ready to dive into ecopreneurship, check out the following list of tips and resources to help you get started! **Launching a New Business** Starting a new business involves several complex steps. As you prepare for your launch, think about how you can keep it sustainable! ● Explore your [funding options](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/199429?id=407132.1519.1.b9c0ffe3dd7d5d40c77b076501495031&p=eyIlN0IlN0JtaW1pLXNpZ25hdHVyZSU3RCU3RCI6IjE2MjQ2Njc0OS0xMjg2MDE5MjU1My1kNTAxOTIzZTU0NjU5ZDgzYzM1NjY2MzFmMWJhNGMyNzc3MWI2ZDJiIiwiJTdCJTdCZW1haWxJZCU3RCU3RCI6IjQwNzEzMiJ9), whether this means seeking eco-minded investors or launching a crowdfunding campaign.
● Consider forming an LLC to [gain tax advantages](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/199429?id=407132.1520.1.f3a0d38cae5577b3c86b40c9aca3e054&p=eyIlN0IlN0JtaW1pLXNpZ25hdHVyZSU3RCU3RCI6IjE2MjQ2Njc0OS0xMjg2MDE5MjU1My1kNTAxOTIzZTU0NjU5ZDgzYzM1NjY2MzFmMWJhNGMyNzc3MWI2ZDJiIiwiJTdCJTdCZW1haWxJZCU3RCU3RCI6IjQwNzEzMiJ9) and protect yourself from liabilities.
● If you’re setting up a [retail space](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/199429?id=407132.1521.1.1769104304a31f063f4cbe15ed95216a&p=eyIlN0IlN0JtaW1pLXNpZ25hdHVyZSU3RCU3RCI6IjE2MjQ2Njc0OS0xMjg2MDE5MjU1My1kNTAxOTIzZTU0NjU5ZDgzYzM1NjY2MzFmMWJhNGMyNzc3MWI2ZDJiIiwiJTdCJTdCZW1haWxJZCU3RCU3RCI6IjQwNzEzMiJ9), incorporate sustainable elements like natural lighting and reusable bags.
● Consider running your business [from home](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/199429?id=407132.1522.1.509cd4f04e47ec25a1e4376396a80829&p=eyIlN0IlN0JtaW1pLXNpZ25hdHVyZSU3RCU3RCI6IjE2MjQ2Njc0OS0xMjg2MDE5MjU1My1kNTAxOTIzZTU0NjU5ZDgzYzM1NjY2MzFmMWJhNGMyNzc3MWI2ZDJiIiwiJTdCJTdCZW1haWxJZCU3RCU3RCI6IjQwNzEzMiJ9) to reduce your environmental impact. **Creating a Green Business Model** Green industry businesses use sustainable materials to create their products while minimizing the strain on natural resources and the environment as a whole. ● Prioritize minimizing your environmental impact when creating your [business model](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/199429?id=407132.1523.1.3dd8b66cc1a5ee39df1e92d1df9926a4&p=eyIlN0IlN0JtaW1pLXNpZ25hdHVyZSU3RCU3RCI6IjE2MjQ2Njc0OS0xMjg2MDE5MjU1My1kNTAxOTIzZTU0NjU5ZDgzYzM1NjY2MzFmMWJhNGMyNzc3MWI2ZDJiIiwiJTdCJTdCZW1haWxJZCU3RCU3RCI6IjQwNzEzMiJ9).
● For example, you could look for ways to restrict your use of [fossil fuels](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/199429?id=407132.1524.1.99e1a10d979d32f482148e5a7684a734&p=eyIlN0IlN0JtaW1pLXNpZ25hdHVyZSU3RCU3RCI6IjE2MjQ2Njc0OS0xMjg2MDE5MjU1My1kNTAxOTIzZTU0NjU5ZDgzYzM1NjY2MzFmMWJhNGMyNzc3MWI2ZDJiIiwiJTdCJTdCZW1haWxJZCU3RCU3RCI6IjQwNzEzMiJ9).
● A business in any industry, from [construction](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/199429?id=407132.1525.1.e898d62210f9f87396fd8139b80685f2&p=eyIlN0IlN0JtaW1pLXNpZ25hdHVyZSU3RCU3RCI6IjE2MjQ2Njc0OS0xMjg2MDE5MjU1My1kNTAxOTIzZTU0NjU5ZDgzYzM1NjY2MzFmMWJhNGMyNzc3MWI2ZDJiIiwiJTdCJTdCZW1haWxJZCU3RCU3RCI6IjQwNzEzMiJ9) to cosmetics, can be made sustainable by sourcing all-natural products.
● You can produce sustainable clothing with [materials](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/199429?id=407132.1526.1.360bd7216cad7813c7731c0df402aa43&p=eyIlN0IlN0JtaW1pLXNpZ25hdHVyZSU3RCU3RCI6IjE2MjQ2Njc0OS0xMjg2MDE5MjU1My1kNTAxOTIzZTU0NjU5ZDgzYzM1NjY2MzFmMWJhNGMyNzc3MWI2ZDJiIiwiJTdCJTdCZW1haWxJZCU3RCU3RCI6IjQwNzEzMiJ9) like wool, organic hemp, recycled cotton, linen, and Tencel. **Sustainable Business Ideas** Are you still brainstorming business ideas? Check out these eco-friendly business models, from landscaping to fashion. ● [Eco-friendly landscaping](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/199429?id=407132.1527.1.30fe255463fd45952c4cb019f1c64a72&p=eyIlN0IlN0JtaW1pLXNpZ25hdHVyZSU3RCU3RCI6IjE2MjQ2Njc0OS0xMjg2MDE5MjU1My1kNTAxOTIzZTU0NjU5ZDgzYzM1NjY2MzFmMWJhNGMyNzc3MWI2ZDJiIiwiJTdCJTdCZW1haWxJZCU3RCU3RCI6IjQwNzEzMiJ9) and sustainable gardening to help homeowners reduce their water usage and support local wildlife.
● [Energy auditing](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/199429?id=407132.1528.1.f7aa22b84366f87500a44b0b4d0d466a&p=eyIlN0IlN0JtaW1pLXNpZ25hdHVyZSU3RCU3RCI6IjE2MjQ2Njc0OS0xMjg2MDE5MjU1My1kNTAxOTIzZTU0NjU5ZDgzYzM1NjY2MzFmMWJhNGMyNzc3MWI2ZDJiIiwiJTdCJTdCZW1haWxJZCU3RCU3RCI6IjQwNzEzMiJ9) for businesses and individuals to help them reduce their carbon footprint.
● Open an [organic restaurant](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/199429?id=407132.1529.1.8097c1bde76f0f046daa6a894b27a7e9&p=eyIlN0IlN0JtaW1pLXNpZ25hdHVyZSU3RCU3RCI6IjE2MjQ2Njc0OS0xMjg2MDE5MjU1My1kNTAxOTIzZTU0NjU5ZDgzYzM1NjY2MzFmMWJhNGMyNzc3MWI2ZDJiIiwiJTdCJTdCZW1haWxJZCU3RCU3RCI6IjQwNzEzMiJ9) that uses only sustainable and locally sourced produce.
● Find a way to recycle gently used items like [books](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/199429?id=407132.1530.1.19be879fea325c904bc855a599009354&p=eyIlN0IlN0JtaW1pLXNpZ25hdHVyZSU3RCU3RCI6IjE2MjQ2Njc0OS0xMjg2MDE5MjU1My1kNTAxOTIzZTU0NjU5ZDgzYzM1NjY2MzFmMWJhNGMyNzc3MWI2ZDJiIiwiJTdCJTdCZW1haWxJZCU3RCU3RCI6IjQwNzEzMiJ9) and clothing to keep them out of the landfill. Becoming an ecopreneur is an amazing way to give back to our wonderful earth while taking control of your earning power. Who doesn't want to be their own boss? By keeping it sustainable, you can feel even better about your big project! To learn more about Mia Mason’s environmental plan as well as other issues that make up her platform, visit [MiaDMason.us](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/199429?id=407132.1531.1.241c359ccb165cd1a7d479f58217352d&p=eyIlN0IlN0JtaW1pLXNpZ25hdHVyZSU3RCU3RCI6IjE2MjQ2Njc0OS0xMjg2MDE5MjU1My1kNTAxOTIzZTU0NjU5ZDgzYzM1NjY2MzFmMWJhNGMyNzc3MWI2ZDJiIiwiJTdCJTdCZW1haWxJZCU3RCU3RCI6IjQwNzEzMiJ9). Mia Mason is working to restore equality and equity in our communities.

The major opportunity is: We are extending our deadline through midnight tomorrow to close the gap and beat radical leftist Alex Lasry. We are more confident than ever that we can make this up if we have all hands on deck. == == == == == == == == It is vital that we meet our goal today, but we can't do it without YOU. subject: OPEN OHIO NOW - Sign the Petition
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM JOSH,
body:
For an entire year, suffocating business and education restrictions have prevented Ohioans from living the American Dream.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_fznFSSAy3v-OWSr4KXtKT1gmPC0sIeU5A1C6NQjy-FAm21swf4goxW8x-qlo5PPV9e1NDyammOCaNAMVrDhUlw0mB2dx5XGHUq-9Q9EPVTxhvs0xkMZXewNiRPHCu0JDjrAks4n4jwC0S2tMpVxq_Xa80Llfonv_JDrdnQ5TNUzNcZZusdx01RNzoM_sC-i9IAazz6ADVkglRhVDHvBK8i_jsN7e081wpNOBt6kSDe230rSGm-YRtPgtPjXNY17X3j3Fv8n5zvRbAxN_rla1fQwwrAovSFx18DlCFqQ2zCVpraAOdfNtInwic6cNp9Ua7bhGXd8WvNXTr6NAMkvqwvfByFZFwo4bOQndgt4Q3vfwXCzSvjYTHSlUmNXy3b9Rp1CKQKX9WNcaPVvqouprA==&c=59TpYxXmvFE--KPhCqEXr3FJK5Y4R4xBbuqmLG6VQq_juBTV3czHPw==&ch=SCdKWMyMELYl7EcuNDkkLU8Bh4WtFHQxgE4Q1dpKj8O-nx7_gnqs9g==) Friend,

**In March of 2020, Governor Mike DeWine ordered Ohio 's bars, restaurants, and businesses to shut down until further notice. Now, in March 2021, many restrictions STILL have not been lifted. **

_For an entire year_ , suffocating business and education restrictions have prevented thousands of Ohioans from living the American Dream.

_**Thanks to Anthony Fauci 's misinformation and Amy Acton's bad math, the freedoms, liberties, and livelihoods of everyday Ohioans have been trampled on for far too long. **_ [**I 've had enough of this nonsense. That's why I'm calling to end the restrictions, end the mandates, and OPEN OHIO NOW. **](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_fznFSSAy3v-OWSr4KXtKT1gmPC0sIeU5A1C6NQjy-FAm21swf4goxW8x-qlo5PPV9e1NDyammOCaNAMVrDhUlw0mB2dx5XGHUq-9Q9EPVTxhvs0xkMZXewNiRPHCu0JDjrAks4n4jwC0S2tMpVxq_Xa80Llfonv_JDrdnQ5TNUzNcZZusdx01RNzoM_sC-i9IAazz6ADVkglRhVDHvBK8i_jsN7e081wpNOBt6kSDe230rSGm-YRtPgtPjXNY17X3j3Fv8n5zvRbAxN_rla1fQwwrAovSFx18DlCFqQ2zCVpraAOdfNtInwic6cNp9Ua7bhGXd8WvNXTr6NAMkvqwvfByFZFwo4bOQndgt4Q3vfwXCzSvjYTHSlUmNXy3b9Rp1CKQKX9WNcaPVvqouprA==&c=59TpYxXmvFE--KPhCqEXr3FJK5Y4R4xBbuqmLG6VQq_juBTV3czHPw==&ch=SCdKWMyMELYl7EcuNDkkLU8Bh4WtFHQxgE4Q1dpKj8O-nx7_gnqs9g==)

[**CLICK HERE to sign the petition to...**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_fznFSSAy3v-OWSr4KXtKT1gmPC0sIeU5A1C6NQjy-FAm21swf4goxW8x-qlo5PPV9e1NDyammOCaNAMVrDhUlw0mB2dx5XGHUq-9Q9EPVTxhvs0xkMZXewNiRPHCu0JDjrAks4n4jwC0S2tMpVxq_Xa80Llfonv_JDrdnQ5TNUzNcZZusdx01RNzoM_sC-i9IAazz6ADVkglRhVDHvBK8i_jsN7e081wpNOBt6kSDe230rSGm-YRtPgtPjXNY17X3j3Fv8n5zvRbAxN_rla1fQwwrAovSFx18DlCFqQ2zCVpraAOdfNtInwic6cNp9Ua7bhGXd8WvNXTr6NAMkvqwvfByFZFwo4bOQndgt4Q3vfwXCzSvjYTHSlUmNXy3b9Rp1CKQKX9WNcaPVvqouprA==&c=59TpYxXmvFE--KPhCqEXr3FJK5Y4R4xBbuqmLG6VQq_juBTV3czHPw==&ch=SCdKWMyMELYl7EcuNDkkLU8Bh4WtFHQxgE4Q1dpKj8O-nx7_gnqs9g==)
**\- Remove the statewide mask mandate
\- Remove all restrictions on businesses including capacity limits
\- Require that all schools open for in-person instruction
\- Re-open Ohio so that our businesses and communities can thrive** | **[**OPEN OHIO NOW - SIGN THE PETITION**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_fznFSSAy3v-OWSr4KXtKT1gmPC0sIeU5A1C6NQjy-FAm21swf4goxW8x-qlo5PPV9e1NDyammOCaNAMVrDhUlw0mB2dx5XGHUq-9Q9EPVTxhvs0xkMZXewNiRPHCu0JDjrAks4n4jwC0S2tMpVxq_Xa80Llfonv_JDrdnQ5TNUzNcZZusdx01RNzoM_sC-i9IAazz6ADVkglRhVDHvBK8i_jsN7e081wpNOBt6kSDe230rSGm-YRtPgtPjXNY17X3j3Fv8n5zvRbAxN_rla1fQwwrAovSFx18DlCFqQ2zCVpraAOdfNtInwic6cNp9Ua7bhGXd8WvNXTr6NAMkvqwvfByFZFwo4bOQndgt4Q3vfwXCzSvjYTHSlUmNXy3b9Rp1CKQKX9WNcaPVvqouprA==&c=59TpYxXmvFE--KPhCqEXr3FJK5Y4R4xBbuqmLG6VQq_juBTV3czHPw==&ch=SCdKWMyMELYl7EcuNDkkLU8Bh4WtFHQxgE4Q1dpKj8O-nx7_gnqs9g==)**
---
Ohio families deserve better. It's time WE THE PEOPLE stand up to the bureaucrats who trample on our freedoms and liberties.
[_**End the restrictions. End the mandates. Join me TODAY in calling on Governor DeWine to OPEN OHIO NOW >>**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_fznFSSAy3v-OWSr4KXtKT1gmPC0sIeU5A1C6NQjy-FAm21swf4goxW8x-qlo5PPV9e1NDyammOCaNAMVrDhUlw0mB2dx5XGHUq-9Q9EPVTxhvs0xkMZXewNiRPHCu0JDjrAks4n4jwC0S2tMpVxq_Xa80Llfonv_JDrdnQ5TNUzNcZZusdx01RNzoM_sC-i9IAazz6ADVkglRhVDHvBK8i_jsN7e081wpNOBt6kSDe230rSGm-YRtPgtPjXNY17X3j3Fv8n5zvRbAxN_rla1fQwwrAovSFx18DlCFqQ2zCVpraAOdfNtInwic6cNp9Ua7bhGXd8WvNXTr6NAMkvqwvfByFZFwo4bOQndgt4Q3vfwXCzSvjYTHSlUmNXy3b9Rp1CKQKX9WNcaPVvqouprA==&c=59TpYxXmvFE--KPhCqEXr3FJK5Y4R4xBbuqmLG6VQq_juBTV3czHPw==&ch=SCdKWMyMELYl7EcuNDkkLU8Bh4WtFHQxgE4Q1dpKj8O-nx7_gnqs9g==)

Hi Peter,

My team sent you something yesterday. It was a clip of me calling out Democrats for being all talk, no action regarding Governor Cuomo.

**AOC...**

**Jerrold Nadler...**

**New York state Democrats...**

All of these so called leaders are condemning Cuomo but then refusing to act against him.

_That’s not leadership._

Peter, we’re going to hold Cuomo accountable, and after that, we’re going to hold Democrats accountable for their inaction by kicking them out of Congress!

**[Will you help make that a reality by supporting my fight to TAKE BACK THE HOUSE in 2022?](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=dca2dad123514d16b4501f311c5b851f&_e=CekO3PGCGzzMNIiHNNvMVBhlWAcBtZab3tST8TDA4XUhheUkIyL8kWOxoyK3Qmfg17xybrPbnSs38ojRmx7LMOc3om4mHi18txIyOrxa_x4b63ET7GvwjkBdrW9FNUjKdakEtFAwZSfnuED-PVO84qKtio2bnslT6Sesg78HBNN7hnLSmM8otfDpkxO0Lgync5VgmqBG9SUEk6jXFoHgNo6M9Iiwv51oAGMXx1u23s5q8KJaJqWKt-Xds0fMGDE6qyj6PMhOYnVFPwedch_XN9secor0H8kXPi7RHOHRFN0e438jUPLSv1Yp6E9nvV-5urXmezJ5nvyX-Yg1ujtzFbi2eCJHutXmxdjQIQhJWz8kKNb3UrYfO3RLlUkHngTphflpeqy4Lie04VFqSgAZ1x8KJCPkcZgJKx3Jra0plEzgXfq9-8_4CusQn8g9woxC-ElqdrSh9wbpyfC1libMfLJ2ZUPlBW0GCyWj4vewBVJbmce5I8LmMNwGbuU61TPy)**

Andrew

Peter, we’re going to hold Cuomo accountable, and after that, we’re going to hold Democrats accountable for their inaction by kicking them out of Congress! Take a listen ⬇ Andrew called out Democrats in Albany and in Congress for being ALL TALK , and NO ACTION on Cuomo! They get in front of the cameras, fake their outrage, but then do nothing. One moment Democrats are clamoring to take pictures with Cuomo and fawning over him; the next, they’re pretending they're going to actually hold him accountable. That’s why he still has emergency powers and is still locking down New York! Peter, we can’t trust Democrats to actually hold their own accountable; that’s why we must do everything we can to kick the Democrats out of power in 2022. body:
Help retake Trump's Republican House majority so we can FINISH THE WALL.

**Did you watch Donald Trump demolish President Biden 's border policies last night on Fox News?**

He warned us that this migrant crisis is going to get much worse if we didn't keep our borders secure!

_**Remember when President Biden suspended Trump 's border policies on his first day in office?**_

We sure do.

And you know what we've learned with the crisis that's unfolding on the border? President Trump's strong stance on border security was imperative in keeping us safe. That's why it's critical we help him to retake the House!

[**Make an immediate 500% matched gift to show that you stand with President Trump and his America First Agenda!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Cu8FcLuw7Ek8ZJA_upN5T1GgiCL_MB8FCgdkfFXImiJn3DcdCPBAaKSdke3gj0OmNX1iL5YaPOHFYfSULQt9-Z40FAQgnPRH_agRQEqqc1lnlk11j2enJbiLylBFM6RjoE8Wij8hG7oNjRgVpZ26Cie3EaaNDUJRpGmQpsuLmKzMl4rsm1C7XzavgtutM2dte-Bd2NBJ3crXe8s4_A6YnLDD31-GkkDXjscbmiJTl-ys6akeIJzUbwKlS_HXsAZNG-UcpTeH3c7isDw-jKzja1Q9i_4ocjLqDapvKQYwZQmr0uXqkr6XVC7cFFQ6jb2IVghFPREj0IQRU0N-lXTSpHOLebNNbOOwkdrd63oLdPhsv6csJKVtzHuhsnB_adixcJGkM1Z0ErWu9zrTnjBA0PcXaZSe2LR5Z3SS0F5oiEVjtzMGzgnVWSsPDKUBjssJQ7egQuu0LE21zvD3j4BP01MMZHRgHD7QYI4z0Sa6UJfyhzZTYaFqddHs90NOXECH&c=kldoIJuw175kmCLgFW7I4pcTNBgGVEr5Ru-Fft5IidZ7Vm7ixuKqLw==&ch=MMcTNssxTuYkhdxAOhZme_JT0qYut0bmwCzS2w1HfoZJK6v3RbpWFA==)

[**HELP TRUMP SECURE THE BORDER**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Cu8FcLuw7Ek8ZJA_upN5T1GgiCL_MB8FCgdkfFXImiJn3DcdCPBAaKSdke3gj0OmNX1iL5YaPOHFYfSULQt9-Z40FAQgnPRH_agRQEqqc1lnlk11j2enJbiLylBFM6RjoE8Wij8hG7oNjRgVpZ26Cie3EaaNDUJRpGmQpsuLmKzMl4rsm1C7XzavgtutM2dte-Bd2NBJ3crXe8s4_A6YnLDD31-GkkDXjscbmiJTl-ys6akeIJzUbwKlS_HXsAZNG-UcpTeH3c7isDw-jKzja1Q9i_4ocjLqDapvKQYwZQmr0uXqkr6XVC7cFFQ6jb2IVghFPREj0IQRU0N-lXTSpHOLebNNbOOwkdrd63oLdPhsv6csJKVtzHuhsnB_adixcJGkM1Z0ErWu9zrTnjBA0PcXaZSe2LR5Z3SS0F5oiEVjtzMGzgnVWSsPDKUBjssJQ7egQuu0LE21zvD3j4BP01MMZHRgHD7QYI4z0Sa6UJfyhzZTYaFqddHs90NOXECH&c=kldoIJuw175kmCLgFW7I4pcTNBgGVEr5Ru-Fft5IidZ7Vm7ixuKqLw==&ch=MMcTNssxTuYkhdxAOhZme_JT0qYut0bmwCzS2w1HfoZJK6v3RbpWFA==)

_**Here 's what we know about the Left's careless immigration policies:**_

-- They have no intention of finishing or maintaining the Wall at our Southern border.

-- They want to dismantle ICE and DEFUND border patrol agents who are trying to keep Americans safe from potentially dangerous illegal immigrants.

-- Illegal immigrants, many who've tested positive for the Coronavirus, are waiting at the border wearing **" Biden Please Let Us In"** t-shirts!

He warned us that this migrant crisis is going to get much worse if we didn't keep our borders secure! Remember when President Biden suspended Trump 's border policies on his first day in office? We sure do. And you know what we've learned with the crisis that's unfolding on the border? President Trump's strong stance on border security was imperative in keeping us safe. That's why it's critical we help him to retake the House! == == Here 's what we know about the Left's careless immigration policies: -- They have no intention of finishing or maintaining the Wall at our Southern border. -- They want to dismantle ICE and DEFUND border patrol agents who are trying to keep Americans safe from potentially dangerous illegal immigrants. -- Illegal immigrants, many who've tested positive for the Coronavirus, are waiting at the border wearing " Biden Please Let Us In" t-shirts! -- The scariest development yet: terrorists from the Middle East are coming into our country through the southern border! name: Team Young
subject: Friend, it’s all because you believed in Young Kim
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
Many people downplayed Young Kim's potential, but because you believed in her wholeheartedly, she's one of the first Korean American women serving in Congress.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wAxF4CYw_QBH0qFi_dn44eeg56HZzVk6IuB4LJJwPO_weViNwxhRT61fpw_AMWhSjaELAM2VjWU9rnksEICqjarsumEvUFFXvue9QwdW8Pa4fuhroOFy1jdqO6ptzzy-gHZ5UW4OWEHcSrE6B07jGvonYTAmlO5tYamT5l5I1AIhV0qk-Fqi6bLMEGFxlW6j0XjI522AmKj0XgTQpzvZCBjBVORYy82hhCLlnGZcwjXAz4DO7rzmz6WIL4405oi-bpTLAWoWfvo0ZkLMlLEpT1ZvtkbLbmYk4ctv6YnvDqEh31Er23iTH2RSovK-YKADeiZhrrnoE-u9sVN0lU-KirJXlWfX4G9rAh1vdL37b1HNBu4qjVGUoz5vWbe-nCxnUsdGRb7JPJoEmi0CN8cQW3uzk5uOOgp2FFa4f1LYpfU7F4BwTLp3cPlfRI4mHrWZoW3RRjrufWAZwdEp3pgaew==&c=DSnOaNYXSc52VTtW10fPR6hQW5a66mdUbZeJpHKMmxID_tFk24Nu9A==&ch=IAwe9mJScljoQU2rRDpozlkvuSnkmLdTwEBDhLZxbIQ51uxtgZMkkA==)
---
Friend, Last election, Young Kim defeated Gil Cisneros, a Pelosi-backed candidate, by the smallest margins -- only a couple thousand votes. Many people downplayed her potential, but because you believed in her wholeheartedly, she's one of the first Korean American women serving in Congress. _And America is better for it._ She is actively fighting for lower taxes, small business support, affordable healthcare, schools reopening, immigration reform, and battling homelessness in California. She is blazing her own path in Congress, and it's all thanks to you. Now, she's faced with a new challenge. **A Democratic candidate just declared his campaign against her.** If we're going to hold her seat and take back the House for Republicans, then we need your support again. Friend, we're asking 1,500 of our top supporters to make a contribution to help. You're one of them. clean_body: Many people downplayed Young Kim's potential, but because you believed in her wholeheartedly, she's one of the first Korean American women serving in Congress. == Friend, Last election, Young Kim defeated Gil Cisneros, a Pelosi-backed candidate, by the smallest margins -- only a couple thousand votes. Many people downplayed her potential, but because you believed in her wholeheartedly, she's one of the first Korean American women serving in Congress. And America is better for it. She is actively fighting for lower taxes, small business support, affordable healthcare, schools reopening, immigration reform, and battling homelessness in California. She is blazing her own path in Congress, and it's all thanks to you. Now, she's faced with a new challenge. A Democratic candidate just declared his campaign against her. If we're going to hold her seat and take back the House for Republicans, then we need your support again. Friend, we're asking 1,500 of our top supporters to make a contribution to help. You're one of them. == | | == | | == | == | | == | == | | == Serving you in Washington DC is the honor of a lifetime to Young Kim. It's an honor she doesn't take lightly. name: Tom Fitton
subject: Hold Joe Biden Accountable
body:
America is facing a worsening crisis of uncontrolled illegal immigration from the dangerously radical Biden Immigration Agenda!

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Judicial Watch's **Biden Accountability Project** is investigating shady Biden family activities with foreign entities tied to China and Ukraine. To date, we _have filed more than a dozen Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) requests and lawsuits_ against the Justice Department, State Department and Secret Service seeking records relating to our concerns over the following:

* Hunter Biden's business with Burisma Holdings, the knowingly corrupt energy company _which paid Hunter $1 million a year to influence U.S. policy when his father was then-President Obama 's designated "point man" in Ukraine_.
* Then-Vice President Biden's corrupt threat (captured on video) to withhold hundreds of millions of dollars in congressionally appropriated aid and loan guarantees for Ukraine.

* The FBI seizure of a laptop and hard drive containing emails and video from Hunter

Biden which reportedly contain information related to illicit Biden family business dealings in China while Joe Biden was Vice President.
**All the evidence to date points to some very serious allegations \-- which is why _[I hope you will help out by making a tax-deductible contribution to Judicial Watch today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53188&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMTcxNDU2NTc=)_. **
**_[Your support now is especially important](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53188&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMTcxNDU2NTc=)_** as we are engaged in our largest and most important caseload ever.
Judicial Watch has become the most effective government watchdog group in the nation. We fight public corruption and government secrecy wherever we find it... _and we are committed to holding powerful politicians and public officials of both political parties accountable under the law to the American people_ _._
We work every day through the legal system. We dig in and never give up. And **_[we rely on patriots like ot you support our work](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53188&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMTcxNDU2NTc=)_**. Thank you.
Sincerely,
Tom Fitton President

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mansoor=20Khadir?=
subject: Help is Here! Join Us For a Briefing on the American Rescue Plan & How You Can Help Us Spread the Word
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Progressive partners and fellow Democrats, Help is here! Just 50 days since taking office, President Biden and Democrats have secured a major and consequential victory: successfully passing the American Rescue Plan, a bold and historic legislative package that will provide much-needed relief to millions of working people across the country. Please join us on [Thursday, March 18 from 4:00pm-4:30pm ET for a briefing on how you can help us spread the word about the American Rescue Act. Register for this important briefing by clicking here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=d14d21b0ed&e=d6c5c7d7ec). Because of Democrats, working families bearing the brunt of this crisis will see $1,400 direct checks in the mail, thousands more in individual benefits, funding to get more Americans vaccinated, the resources to get our kids and teachers safely back to school, access to more affordable health care and so much more. This is a huge accomplishment, but we still have so much work to do to help our country recover from this pandemic. One thing is clear: we have to keep electing Democrats up and down the ballot to get critical, progressive legislation like the American Rescue Plan across the finish line. When we elect Democrats, working people have more opportunity and better support. Our fundamental rights are restored and protected. But we have to make sure that voters know how we delivered for them when it counted most, and how Republicans did not, when they next head to the ballot box. That’s where you come in! Without you, these victories aren’t possible. To win elections in 2021, 2022 and beyond, we need trusted voices like yours to spread the word now about this incredible victory and what it means for people across the country. This is our time to help our friends and neighbors understand how the ARP benefits them, and what Democrats are able to deliver with their support. [Please join us Thursday, March 18 at 4:00pm ET for this important briefing](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=a0b5fb6212&e=d6c5c7d7ec)

Thank you,
Mansoor Khadir
Senior Advisor - DNC Political Department
Twitter: @MansoorKhadir

---

name: GOP Notification via NVAF
subject: Urgent: Please read
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Victory Action Fund
body:
Our crucial deadline has come and gone, and we came up short of our goal by just $17,413.
We don't have much time, Friend,

Our crucial deadline has come and gone, and we came up short of our goal by _**just $17,413.**_

subject: Friend, what would you ask Joe Biden?

body:
It's been over 50 days and Joe Biden has yet to hold a press conference as President.
Friend,

Why is Joe Biden hiding from the press?

**It 's been over 50 days and Joe Biden has yet to hold a press conference as President.**

President Biden just signed into law a MASSIVE spending package, there is a surge of illegal immigrants at the border, and we are undergoing a complicated vaccination effort. It is time he answers some tough questions!

**Friend, we want to know what YOU would ask President Biden if given the chance.**

body:
Pelosi wants to stack the deck against Republicans. With the latest bill she just jammed through, law-abiding Republicans won't stand a chance... We're looking for 100,000 conservatives to join our efforts in support of flipping the House before Biden's first State of the Union on February 23rd.

| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ca83148c314a401d81e712a142a2aa68&_e=k1xGWATeha9PhvL8xBSbBokcnVhkiXuVgnR7s_umCqMBlJjERmldyHGMQ0CDLNLjCLldGM5nL64GHt0h8Jk9vC_EfgRcO8Ax4VKkmrHCWQHyDv4huxu2tffxkbjTEKn8FxxB6fSlFIZ9RgmY6b0u6typUPCAkMmhAU-p1uPrKI0otrPPKLfFCrx0PCOaAhtmPkfTpfL_NSjY0hicIPopuSoktutmAFqkMJYxeli3KtiUeka8obAcRxfIIu4j5O4OLIJnXSB0kHrw4tJvi8v2ELSGFvMrAffZyuRhqnYeoKw-toFl7bzkIGEdpCpjyfk3SUvqn72Pja7sbdAx2ZtOMVfqnqjlrnrTnnN3cbbJLzzlQ917THDSzw8h6obJW2K91hFaiN6CW8CLMmohhhM1gYMcG_epShqk5kKXsN_O-Ra85uwxqqBnJIwVR9inGgp-VyLsJgTHlYPE86Mam9dVfcPgYQSHflo6VKGK_efUFOJZbSto3isuUgYYFj0XY4b8)

Fellow American,

What a month it’s been for the socialist agenda in Congress. First, Nancy Pelosi passed the $1.9 trillion COVID relief package in the House – **in the middle of the night** – without a single Republican vote.

Then, Pelosi and House Democrats pushed through another outrageous piece of legislation – H.R. 1, a massive election reform bill — which if passed by the Senate would enable **Democrats** to cement a **permanent Congressional majority**.

How? By requiring states to adopt national voting standards set forth by Democrats in Congress including,
1. Allowing government agencies to _**ignore immigration status**_ when referring applicants to election boards under “automatic” voter registration, and,
2. Doing away with state voter-ID laws. No ID to verify voter eligibility? No problem!

# [U.S. Lifts Yemeni Militant Group’s Terrorist Designation for Humanitarian Reasons](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53194&L=22380&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY29ycnVwdGlvbi1jaHJvbmljbGVzL3VzLWxpZnRzLWhvdXRoaS1kZXNpZ25hdGlvbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDMxNzE2MjkzNQ==)
Days after a “humanitarian situation” compelled the Biden administration to revoke the terrorist designation of a Yemen-based militant group, the U.S. is sending the Islamic nation $191 million in assistance. Yemen is a hotbed of terrorism that serves as the headquarters of Al Qaeda in the Arabian Peninsula (AQAP). The international community strongly opposed the Trump administration’s classification of another Yemeni radical faction, Ansarallah, as a specially designated global terrorist entity asserting that it would come with repercussions for humanitarian operations. In a Federal Register bulletin announcing the move the State Department writes that Ansarallah, also known as Partisans of God, has committed or has attempted to commit, or poses a significant risk of committing, or has participated in training to commit, acts of terrorism that threaten the security of U.S. nationals or the national security, foreign policy, or economy of the United States.

clean_body: Days after a “humanitarian situation” compelled the Biden administration to revoke the terrorist designation of a Yemen-based militant group, the U.S. is sending the Islamic nation $191 million in assistance. | | | Because no one is above the law! | March 17, 2021 ---|---|--- | | == == Days after a “humanitarian situation” compelled the Biden administration to revoke the terrorist designation of a Yemen-based militant group, the U.S. is sending the Islamic nation $191 million in assistance. Yemen is a hotbed of terrorism that serves as the headquarters of Al Qaeda in the Arabian Peninsula (AQAP). The international community strongly opposed the Trump administration’s classification of another Yemeni radical faction, Ansarallah, as a specially designated global terrorist entity asserting that it would come with repercussions for humanitarian operations. In a Federal Register bulletin announcing the move the State Department writes that Ansarallah, also known as Partisans of God, has committed or has attempted to commit, or poses a significant risk of committing, or has participated in training to commit, acts of terrorism that threaten the security of U.S. nationals or the national security, foreign policy, or economy of the United States. == | | | = Judicial Watch “Thousands of nursing home residents in New York and Pennsylvania may have died thanks to those states’ COVID-19 mandates,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “The public, particularly those who lost loved ones due to the policies of the Cuomo and Wolf administrations, have a right to know the full truth about this public health scandal.” = Judicial Watch Judicial Watch announced recently that a federal court ordered the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) to release additional information about its purchases of organs harvested from aborted human fetuses. The court also found “there is reason to question” whether the transactions violate federal law barring the sale of fetal organs. Documents previously uncovered in this lawsuit show that the federal government demanded the purchased fetal organs be “fresh and never frozen.” Judicial Watch Predictably, the Biden administration’s disastrous immigration policies are having a detrimental impact on the U.S. even though they have only been in place for weeks. Last month the administration restricted ICE from making arrests by reducing agents’ enforcement priorities and forcing them to seek written permission from senior supervisors before arresting fugitives. | CLIPS == | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | = | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved = |

body:
Pelosi wants to stack the deck against Republicans. With the latest bill she just jammed through, law-abiding Republicans won't stand a chance... We're looking for 100,000 conservatives to join our efforts in support of flipping the House before Biden's first State of the Union on February 23rd.

| [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=593cd1367e1248819eed706e723380b5&_e=BnlkIJ0djFv2qekTIXSKBYdCnaXssY9YWdD1hYZYu8M-8U4TOpK9GNwpSKSrp7VRw-T5AwhfLRbaKv3C7civcLDY25S70p_HfuER0dOj6mhmVJz18LeT6_t5WF5rLdsl60xDmVt4gQydEcVWslCHJhCgILXwVnSc5LG4_Rw_vz1PnAyuRuCWm3FKi3TKcoJrQgFS6TSKB37wEmS-P1H9KY6ymanXLdw1RgOjQ3xytiG6ly1vUrFZjYRbnGpdq-3v9kwskyx3ppOjCtR8bmqVL3ZqnWCeIqMQ7iK8sy5rip2VKTZMWYI2Zt2G8otoDvXOqfHOZHvsSDzcFJZl0rDyjX4Glu1LNZXfM-r3tlI190Are4YnSVrRfB82n1r4DFh5VDq6isUNeBNc4XMbx_Q6LaDlOmy-OSJq6LPknhIlPuAGEH_eNC-C8A2AlO-ghrjZs2Eklk4NB2soIyW5-Ji1louXNc-to8gX16k2c0-pTvjl59HDPHrx0ZzH-mci8K93)
---
**ELECTION INTEGRITY PLEDGE** : Pelosi wants to stack the deck against Republicans by federalizing elections. **We can put an end to these attempts at fundamentally altering the way our elections are run – but to do so we need to elect a Republican majority **.

**[We're looking for 1,000 conservatives to sign our Election Integrity Pledge today. Please add your signature before midnight.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=593cd1367e1248819eed706e723380b5&_e=BnlkIJ0djFv2qekTIXSKBYdCnaXssY9YWdD1hYZYu8M-8U4TOpK9GNwpSKSrp7VRw-T5AwhfLRbaKv3C7civcLDY25S70p_HfuER0dOj6mhmVJz18LeT6_t5WF5rLdsl60xDmVt4gQydEcVWslCHJhCgILXwVnSc5LG4_Rw_vz1PnAyuRuCWm3FKi3TKcoJrQgFS6TSKB37wEmS-P1H9KY6ymanXLdw1RgOjQ3xytiG6ly1vUrFZjYRbnGpdq-3v9kwskyx3ppOjCtR8bmqVL3ZqnWCeIqMQ7iK8sy5rip3KArzFyYth1fdpS3tQurHrZIc9M3l4v5nE5QWxsGNpJV5kPLzL4Ae9PWiEhtPsKN_1YLzKZ2TDdV7KvMjaxUvSMDlNJ4ZzIMSpkgtgyFeiH6N9nljGpD1q6tOR95p-rmlAvmbcYZhcjwA0nWJg0QmcblIYcv9VQHsCYinNDT1dv2jDlLeGoRx2cM28fGdrOOhJv5NwaTfrkwXu2TIcqrtF) **

| [**Stand With Me
Protect Voter ID Laws➔**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=593cd1367e1248819eed706e723380b5&_e=BnlkIJ0djFv2qekTIXSKBYdCnaXssY9YWdD1hYZYu8M-8U4TOpK9GNwpSKSrp7VRw-T5AwhfLRbaKv3C7civcLDY25S70p_HfuER0dOj6mhmVJz18LeT6_t5WF5rLdsl60xDmVt4gQydEcVWslCHJhCgILXwVnSc5LG4_Rw_vz1PnAyuRuCWm3FKi3TKcoJrQgFS6TSKB37wEmS-P1H9KY6ymanXLdw1RgOjQ3xytiG6ly1vUrFZjYRbnGpdq-3v9kwskyx3ppOjCtR8bmqVL3ZqnWCeIqMQ7iK8sy5rip0FZ2y8LU88fAY4DsGsYAaHL_JTkxG5t7DAVknsoFc9myMu9xXpsFHn8esTUn8SCPS0dweI8SQlWPiQ5iqCHSObLZNVttEpOlR8qhOM2-kWkpHQPs_4ZC2KljhE4Iij7VMmRIPTAn9WiBkHZWdyomB7bLvICGX-1CYtlREobRRQZkIDwXAN3TTeizxpPqpoa5SD6DjBrEL0JnvfiKurzZKt)
---

Fellow American,

What a month it’s been for the socialist agenda in Congress. First, Nancy Pelosi passed the $1.9 trillion COVID relief package in the House – **in the middle of the night** – without a single Republican vote.

Then, Pelosi and House Democrats pushed through another outrageous piece of legislation – H.R. 1, a massive election reform bill — which if passed by the Senate would enable **Democrats** to cement a **permanent Congressional majority**.

How? By requiring states to adopt national voting standards set forth by Democrats in Congress including,
1. Allowing government agencies to _**ignore immigration status**_ when referring applicants to election boards under “automatic” voter registration, and,
2. Doing away with state voter-ID laws. No ID to verify voter eligibility? No problem!

[**Stand With Me
Protect Voter ID Laws➔**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=593cd1367e1248819eed706e723380b5&_e=BnlkIJ0djFv2qekTIXSKBYdCnaXssY9YWdD1hYZYu8M-8U4TOpK9GNwpSKSrp7VRw-T5AwhfLRbaKv3C7civcLDY25S70p_HfuER0dOj6mhmVJz18LeT6_t5WF5rLdsl60xDmVt4gQydEcVWslCHJhCgILXwVnSc5LG4_Rw_vz1PnAyuRuCWm3FKi3TKcoJrQgFS6TSKB37wEmS-P1H9KY6ymanXLdw1RgOjQ3xytiG6ly1vUrFZjYRbnGpdq-3v9kwskyx3ppOjCtR8bmqVL3ZqnWCeIqMQ7iK8sy5rip1tZ3mWuJyQrmreM0zyRCBHQ6ZBfE-ZypU87dslUzFQvKAAnNdPP1Wf71xodQicwahsMaAZ3bFTiwuOaSMjSsrwGqiPcbs7HFr9Wdevjl4ag4nvXEgDkLDL_T7kTNrO70kD20gX-kJntHF4wCSaFzQuPlW8jDiVIavptH9sywoifAUz6XMqjlZr4pkoR0pA5oy3nxONMv4rc5yqONpg_EMh)
---

While the entire bill is rubbish, there are several provisions that worry me more than others. Should Senate Democrats pass H.R. 1:
1. Members of Congress would be entitled to taxpayer money to fund their campaigns – up to $5 MILLION dollars.
2. Congress will be committed to delivering “full congressional voting rights to the District of Columbia (Washington, D.C.) – bypassing a vote on D.C. statehood which cannot pass in a bill of its own.

**We can put an end to these thinly-veiled attempts at fundamentally altering the way our elections are run – but to do so we need to elect a Republican majority**.

[**Stand With Me
Protect Voter ID Laws➔**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=593cd1367e1248819eed706e723380b5&_e=BnlkIJ0djFv2qekTIXSKBYdCnaXssY9YWdD1hYZYu8M-8U4TOpK9GNwpSKSrp7VRw-T5AwhfLRbaKv3C7civcLDY25S70p_HfuER0dOj6mhmVJz18LeT6_t5WF5rLdsl60xDmVt4gQydEcVWslCHJhCgILXwVnSc5LG4_Rw_vz1PnAyuRuCWm3FKi3TKcoJrQgFS6TSKB37wEmS-P1H9KY6ymanXLdw1RgOjQ3xytiG6ly1vUrFZjYRbnGpdq-3v9kwskyx3ppOjCtR8bmqVL3ZqnWCeIqMQ7iK8sy5rip3BLWdJS_1O8VWFNAZCdWx6nW9Cajyn9Ktuas2XMLY34x5WWMC1dxy1qZScxMKkdaodNWgF4pbtPDQ4hW0u-W89LCJh6QnBbtP_y8NNlOrSZ6WIR8F1yzosYs2HrnM35_xEZOoRdDcEfCnCpud8L2YMSaIs-icyZ7vKpaqHxELS0KkosvPn006dajA2rfNaMzlByTGIj2K4FVM0eRKgjVKM)
---

I have to be honest with you, Fellow American, while the COVID-relief package was chock full of wasteful spending that increased the budget deficit exponentially, H.R. 1 would fundamentally alter American elections _forever_.

It’s our duty to raise awareness about Pelosi’s blatant attempt to amass a permanent Democrat majority in Congress. **[If we don’t act now, soon it may be too late.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=593cd1367e1248819eed706e723380b5&_e=BnlkIJ0djFv2qekTIXSKBYdCnaXssY9YWdD1hYZYu8M-8U4TOpK9GNwpSKSrp7VRw-T5AwhfLRbaKv3C7civcLDY25S70p_HfuER0dOj6mhmVJz18LeT6_t5WF5rLdsl60xDmVt4gQydEcVWslCHJhCgILXwVnSc5LG4_Rw_vz1PnAyuRuCWm3FKi3TKcoJrQgFS6TSKB37wEmS-P1H9KY6ymanXLdw1RgOjQ3xytiG6ly1vUrFZjYRbnGpdq-3v9kwskyx3ppOjCtR8bmqVL3ZqnWCeIqMQ7iK8sy5rip0OE7nYui76-eUkblrtVYr1Ynv9OB7-Ik0dJlljgdJ67TzzNsIs_gDWSm8RfQy6DgJrJKCP-F4ZUSGbBwSV4uYGOUT2ZclSqCXXJ4RywAmOr7GkP0HgLo1HUBN_MHttNbPx_puKadKvO4DHj83rJMZdJML9EzW7RF7631If9WfYHhHrSkNRqpownJM2zWFV2bHO1CNHyQPNZY36zbsghAwg)**

Democrats are not going to adopt rules from states who have their act together – like Ohio and Florida – **they’re going to take their cue from Pennsylvania, New York, California and Illinois**.

Consider that for 97 days, New York’s 22nd Congressional District was without a member of Congress. Why? Due to severe delays in tabulating votes caused by confusion over hastily written voting laws put into place at the start of the pandemic.

Or consider that, while Florida was able to count more than 11 million votes in the run up to Election Day, **it took Pennsylvania more than two weeks to count their votes**.

[**Stand With Me
Protect Voter ID Laws➔**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=593cd1367e1248819eed706e723380b5&_e=BnlkIJ0djFv2qekTIXSKBYdCnaXssY9YWdD1hYZYu8M-8U4TOpK9GNwpSKSrp7VRw-T5AwhfLRbaKv3C7civcLDY25S70p_HfuER0dOj6mhmVJz18LeT6_t5WF5rLdsl60xDmVt4gQydEcVWslCHJhCgILXwVnSc5LG4_Rw_vz1PnAyuRuCWm3FKi3TKcoJrQgFS6TSKB37wEmS-P1H9KY6ymanXLdw1RgOjQ3xytiG6ly1vUrFZjYRbnGpdq-3v9kwskyx3ppOjCtR8bmqVL3ZqnWCeIqMQ7iK8sy5rip27vdnWM8-ZoCFCsPHnFnatFy_MoGUFPENgPII5UisuhQPeBf78cJyek9wIUqFM5jn5CcE1YeIH8dn0HtNhLCOdqLbi-JJkOdYOLGmc2AJbZl2MX0xhd4wnRK75H_nKuHIuhrAuTNpSBijVb20O-QvvBCZsdznIZ13hPL4FQJBTt5SkbYrAUI0UyvQR6VZFHqacWOgG55bLuCQyCCC4QdgX)
---

**On a final note:** With the adoption of H.R. 1, it will become exponentially harder for states to update voter rolls without federal oversight. That will lead to more and more voter fraud!

In the name of liberty, **[please sign our petition today denouncing H.R. 1.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=593cd1367e1248819eed706e723380b5&_e=BnlkIJ0djFv2qekTIXSKBYdCnaXssY9YWdD1hYZYu8M-8U4TOpK9GNwpSKSrp7VRw-T5AwhfLRbaKv3C7civcLDY25S70p_HfuER0dOj6mhmVJz18LeT6_t5WF5rLdsl60xDmVt4gQydEcVWslCHJhCgILXwVnSc5LG4_Rw_vz1PnAyuRuCWm3FKi3TKcoJrQgFS6TSKB37wEmS-P1H9KY6ymanXLdw1RgOjQ3xytiG6ly1vUrFZjYRbnGpdq-3v9kwskyx3ppOjCtR8bmqVL3ZqnWCeIqMQ7iK8sy5rip18vkCjSDrvQ9ADNFUsAWOC5qSYXNc02UDbpa_dIo4I3Ky5Azdp2r84WmqKh_178VnfXjpq_4x1WLS60F14G5CCKNtu7p4XU7URhfo-WjnN8lmKB3bPRCln0BQLqr7U5IDYzEyGKjdhYBao2wqc605xDQ54McTQSY-emEbo1bGy3zRX_W_kK7uynyFRGdDytxX8edvVSYFLW_twzxFP0hVo)**

We must act before it’s too late.

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=593cd1367e1248819eed706e723380b5&_e=BnlkIJ0djFv2qekTIXSKBYdCnaXssY9YWdD1hYZYu8M-8U4TOpK9GNwpSKSrp7VRw-T5AwhfLRbaKv3C7civcLDY25S70p_HfuER0dOj6mhmVJz18LeT6_t5WF5rLdsl60xDmVt4gQydEcVWslCHJhCgILXwVnSc5LG4_Rw_vz1PnAyuRuCWm3FKi3TKcoJrQgFS6TSKB37wEmS-P1H9KY6ymanXLdw1RgOjQ3xytiG6ly1vUrFZjYRbnGpdq-3v9kwskyx3ppOjCtR8bmqVL3ZqnWCeIqMQ7iK8sy5rip0kuK6_wyHAJuF2VyDd1GyW6rfduH7cqUrJbvPaDzuEaPvJLYc5PXaatAmjWcgN_hdgG7a-f0jgKmxuQZpArooy-7Udlwl_hznD4D-_ZLLviCqDXVTXJg2qoN9rpR01MsUil3fmnc4OM7cs7OpIYdXWt2FmZCuN17IiBn2lQUNOTGCHpzgWiCloE39WcEqQoKtjxX83jvq4_g4OZmusx6kC)

clean_body: Pelosi wants to stack the deck against Republicans. With the latest bill she just jammed through, law-abiding Republicans won't stand a chance... We're looking for 100,000 conservatives to join our efforts in support of flipping the House before Biden's first State of the Union on February 23rd. | ELECTION INTEGRITY PLEDGE : Pelosi wants to stack the deck against Republicans by federalizing elections. We can put an end to these attempts at fundamentally altering the way our elections are run – but to do so we need to elect a Republican majority . | Fellow American, What a month it’s been for the socialist agenda in Congress. First, Nancy Pelosi passed the $1.9 trillion COVID relief package in the House – in the middle of the night – without a single Republican vote. Then, Pelosi and House Democrats pushed through another outrageous piece of legislation – H.R. 1, a massive election reform bill — which if passed by the Senate would enable Democrats to cement a permanent Congressional majority. How? By requiring states to adopt national voting standards set forth by Democrats in Congress including, 1. Allowing government agencies to ignore immigration status when referring applicants to election boards under “automatic” voter registration, and, 2. Doing away with state voter-ID laws. No ID to verify voter eligibility? No problem! While the entire bill is rubbish, there are several provisions that worry me more than others. Should Senate Democrats pass H.R. 1: 1. Members of Congress would be entitled to taxpayer money to fund their campaigns – up to $5 MILLION dollars. 2. Congress will be committed to delivering “full congressional voting rights to the District of Columbia (Washington, D.C.) – bypassing a vote on D.C. statehood which cannot pass in a bill of its own. We can put an end to these thinly-veiled attempts at fundamentally altering the way our elections are run – but to do so we need to elect a Republican majority. I have to be honest with you, Fellow American, while the COVID-relief package was chock full of wasteful spending that increased the budget deficit exponentially, H.R. 1 would fundamentally alter American elections forever. It’s our duty to raise awareness about Pelosi’s blatant attempt to amass a permanent Democrat majority in Congress. Democrats are not going to adopt rules from states who have their act together – like Ohio and Florida – they’re going to take their cue from Pennsylvania, New York, California and Illinois. Consider that for 97 days, New York’s 22nd Congressional District was without a member of Congress. Why? Due to severe delays in tabulating votes caused by confusion over hastily written voting laws put into place at the start of the pandemic. Or consider that, while Florida was able to count more than 11 million votes in the run up to Election Day, it took Pennsylvania more than two weeks to count their votes. On a final note: With the adoption of H.R. 1, it will become exponentially harder for states to update voter rolls without federal oversight. That will lead to more and more voter fraud! In the name of liberty, We must act before it’s too late. Jim Jordan Don't want to receive our emails? | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015

Peter,
Don’t let the liberal media lie to you — _**Joe Biden's bad policies created the current crisis at our southern border.**_

Liberals are attempting to blame Republicans for the crisis at the border, when in reality, it clearly began when Joe Biden lifted Trump’s border policies and offered mass amnesty.

For more context about just how bad it is, more illegal immigrants are coming to our southern border in the past two months than did in **ALL OF 2020 COMBINED!** The numbers speak for themselves.

**This all could have been avoided, but bad policy decisions led to a crisis, and this administration is squarely to blame. **

_**We need to get the truth out about the border crisis.**_
[_**Donate NOW for strong borders! >>>**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=b94cf5c56055447aad9b7f85f8bfb1f6&_e=KYSHN9wB5xvDvmWyzJHCJvZBz2D_v181HrJha5v4KtxaxMLpD_vh4qVA_bWAc3XjacgRu3n52LhKoylk_RauccCBlFinUd1jx0AY4jR9Ued1CF24TTS9G-47j-Sw1nq7d2mrhp6-gNOCgc0VhFWVJmbdCLSM5c2H9TfswaLvqiTDjghZwvy8ZoGQrOLPjT-T-cZ5wIVl9hcD1nY0dcYCvbdPte1vjswcngRkjVGriJv-6IporMr6D3fEDuUFFvxxtLvpKk6IyE7d-RKXEAiViQW3E_rU8MPVQsLJ55qxcNVfptbbPePjnwq4YUoZGCX_PWfbYsyq4BihdnOQ-RfkWoK4IDjsjg23adipe1N1MLy-VC-U0zsmUs_EgczcqgbqYce4gdUx35kSTjDgFmFwvQ%3D%3D)
Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi can try to blame Republicans all they want. The fact is, they are hiding behind the barbed-wire fence they built at the Capitol building while millions of American lives are in danger because of their open-border policy.

_**It’s not right.**_

**A nation does not exist without borders. We need to correct this issue _NOW_.** Please join us in this effort.
[**Donate _HERE_ to help us spread Truth over Lies**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=b94cf5c56055447aad9b7f85f8bfb1f6&_e=KYSHN9wB5xvDvmWyzJHCJvZBz2D_v181HrJha5v4KtxaxMLpD_vh4qVA_bWAc3XjacgRu3n52LhKoylk_RauccCBlFinUd1jx0AY4jR9Ued1CF24TTS9G-47j-Sw1nq7d2mrhp6-gNOCgc0VhFWVJmbdCLSM5c2H9TfswaLvqiTDjghZwvy8ZoGQrOLPjT-T0Dp04sad34fkdLMMxo4sMNpdy03EQgJjLY1I0MgFWsrWqhZq-XArhBk6ChvUZ12SL_g2Kng6ROpEfBXefMsPsXYLZ_yxCncOSWEYKRYtvhEYdDgiLoK-A-UjkUzaroZJIV5sQ_Jg64nt-jo2KXJ7d4w8OxUgxQJbeqP5ui5eBZlfq7c5g2tGBEeg4ddKnvPP-EgGXko43xUlA_ls-o6sBA%3D%3D)

Thank you,
Josh Hawley

name: Stop Jeff Bezos
subject: Sign and send this petition to stop Amazon from crushing a union
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEMAND PROGRESS (<a href="http://demandprogress
body: Peter, [ https://act.demandprogress.org/sign/amazon-union/?t=1001&akid=27749%2E8104458%2EbSifSI ]Will you sign the petition and show solidarity with Amazon workers trying to form a union? This is a BFD: President Biden just spoke out in support of a unionizing drive at Amazon's Bessemer warehouse in Alabama, where over 6,000 workers are about to vote whether to form Amazon's first unionized warehouse in the US.^1 This could pave the way for more worker organizing against the dangerous Big Tech behemoth. In response, Amazon hired a Koch-backed anti-union consultant to help thwart the crucial election.^2 Organizing a union at a monopolistic company Amazon isn't easy. Jeff Bezos is using every bit of the power and wealth he has amassed to stop workers. We need to stand with them -- by regulating and breaking up Amazon's power, making it easier for workers to organize. [ https://act.demandprogress.org/sign/amazon-union/?t=1002&akid=27749%2E8104458%2EbSifSI ]Sign the petition: Show solidarity with Alabama workers—Congress must break up Amazon! ADD YOUR NAME Biden spoke against efforts by employers like Amazon to intimidate, coerce, threaten, and feed their workers anti-unionization propaganda. It is a hopeful sign that Biden will stand by the labor law he campaigned on—but a real show of solidarity with workers would mean dismantling Amazon's monstrous monopoly. Amazon's intimidation efforts include sending text blasts to workers warning against unionization, Facebook ads pressuring workers to vote “no,” and requiring workers to attend "classes" at which instructors have intimidated pro-union workers by threatening them with wage reductions. They've even flooded Twitter with accounts propagating strategic anti-union messaging. Throughout the pandemic, Amazon has violently pursued profits at the expense of workers' health and safety. They've responded to workers' concerns over life-threatening labor conditions with increased surveillance and higher productivity quotas. As workers' demands have been ignored, Amazon CEO Jeff Bezos' net worth has spiked more than 70%, putting him well on track to becoming the world's first trillionaire by 2026.^3 A monopoly the size of Amazon needs to be met with aggressive antitrust laws now. [ https://act.demandprogress.org/sign/amazon-union/?t=1003&akid=27749%2E8104458%2EbSifSI ]Sign the petition: Show solidarity with Alabama workers—Congress must break up Amazon! Thanks for taking action, Tara and the team at Demand Progress [ https://act.demandprogress.org/go/37857?t=1004&akid=27749%2E8104458%2EbSifSI ]DONATE Sources: 1. NPR, "Biden Backs Amazon Warehouse Workers' Union Drive,", [ https://act.demandprogress.org/go/37854?t=1005&akid=27749%2E8104458%2EbSifSI ]March 1, 2021 2. The Intercept, "Amazon Hired Koch-Backed Anti-Union Consultant to Fight Alabama Warehouse Organizing," [ https://act.demandprogress.org/go/37855?t=1006&akid=27749%2E8104458%2EbSifSI ]February 10, 2021. 3. The Nation, "As Pandemic Profits Put Bezos on Track for Trillionaire Status, Tish James Asks: At What Cost?" [ https://act.demandprogress.org/go/37856?t=1007&akid=27749%2E8104458%2EbSifSI ]February 23, 2021. ---------- PAID FOR BY DEMAND PROGRESS (DemandProgress.org) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Join our online community on Facebook or Twitter. You can unsubscribe from this list at any time: http://act.demandprogress.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=27749%2E8104458%2EbSifSI

name: Senator Mark Warner
subject: I am honored to serve as Senate Intelligence chairman
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26385338/276790789/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTZjMTAwZC03MTg3LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qNUvKmSl9eojHCIjJVbiVGX7lrD_F9n2pmzHpEuHWVo=&emci=07a44b15-3687-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=6e6c100d-7187-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek,

With a new Democratic majority in the U.S. Senate, I recently became the chairman of the Senate Intelligence Committee. I'm proud to follow in the footsteps of my friend and mentor, former Virginia Senator John Warner (no relation) to become the first Virginian to chair a Senate committee in over a decade. The committee oversees the entire U.S. Intelligence Community: from the CIA to the Defense Intelligence Agency to the intelligence elements of our Armed Forces. Many of the brave men and women who serve in our intelligence community live and work here in Virginia.

**This is not a job I take lightly, especially given the events of the past four years.**

The previous administration spent their entire time in office undermining and politicizing the Intelligence Community, which threatens lasting damage to America's national security. Furthermore, in recent years we've seen an alarming rise in anti-government extremists and increasing cyber espionage conducted against the United States by hostile foreign actors.

In light of these grave threats, I have several top priorities for the Intel Committee:
1. **_Rebuild intelligence community agencies_** and departments that were understaffed and under-resourced in the previous administration.
2. **_Depoliticize our intelligence-gathering apparatus_** , so these tireless and patriotic public servants can stay above the partisan fray and focus on their jobs: safeguarding the American people.
3. **_Root out anti-government extremism_** , including the white nationalist militias that participated in the January 6th insurrection at our Capitol.
4. **_Strengthen America's cybersecurity capabilities_** so we never have a repeat of cyber attacks like the 2020 SolarWinds cyber espionage campaign.

I am honored to serve as Senate Intelligence chairman. **So, here is my promise to you, to all Virginians, and our career intelligence professionals on the front lines: I will not let you down.** To the best of my ability, I will work to rebuild and depoliticize our Intelligence Community, tackle extremism and foreign cyber espionage, and always strive to maintain the committee's reputation for bipartisan work to protect America's national security.

**[You can read more about my plans as Senate Intelligence Committee chairman in this recent article from _The New York Times_.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26385342/276790790/-1773025963?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTZjMTAwZC03MTg3LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qNUvKmSl9eojHCIjJVbiVGX7lrD_F9n2pmzHpEuHWVo=&emci=07a44b15-3687-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=6e6c100d-7187-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&ceid=4568237)**

Thank you,
Sen. Mark Warner

They’ve put in the hustle to knock hundreds of thousands of doors, make millions of phone calls, organize their fellow union members, and vote in every corner of the state. But the recent influx of outside spending from pro-Trump Super PACs is like nothing Nevada has seen before. Trump and his allies are gearing up to flip Nevada red, and this is what’s at stake: The first Latina to EVER be elected to the United States Senate is up for re-election The first Democratic Governor to represent Nevada in TWO DECADES is up for re-election Republicans are targeting NV-03 + NV-04, two of the country’s MOST FLIPPABLE Congressional districts We can stop them in their tracks -- but it’ll take all of us pitching in. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Donald Trump and National Republicans did everything they could to undermine the 2020 election.
